slides.headline: Understand Qualifying Criteria
slides.body: Learn the criteria for applying mitigating circumstances in VA benefit administration.

slides.headline: Definition
slides.body: Mitigating circumstances are events that significantly impact a student's ability to continue education.

slides.headline: Qualifying Events
slides.body: Events must be substantial and beyond the student's control.

slides.headline: Documented Evidence
slides.body: Document the event and its impact on education.

slides.headline: Impact Assessment
slides.body: Assess how the event affects the student's ability to continue education.

slides.headline: Approval Process
slides.body: Submit the documentation to your SAA for review and approval.

outline.caption: Master the application of mitigating circumstances in VA benefit administration with clear qualifying criteria and documentation requirements. Learn how to document these events and assess their impact on education.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Documented Evidence,' as the text is a bit dense and could benefit from a more concise bullet point structure.
